ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genetic_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the genetic factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genetic factor */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the genetic factor */,
  "prevalence" REAL /* Prevalence of the genetic factor in different populations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physical_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each physical attribute */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the physical attribute */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the physical attribute */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the physical attribute */,
  "normal_range" TEXT /* Normal range for the physical attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifestyle_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifestyle factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the lifestyle factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lifestyle factor */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for lifestyle changes or interventions */,
  "resources" TEXT /* Resources available to support lifestyle changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bmi_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each BMI category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the BMI category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the BMI category */,
  "health_risks" TEXT /* Health risks associated with the BMI category */,
  "interventions" TEXT /* Interventions available for the BMI category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medical condition */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms of the medical condition */,
  "treatment_options" TEXT /* Treatment options available for the medical condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, healthcare provider, admin) */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization or area of expertise of the user */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications or qualifications of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the data (e.g., login credentials, IP address) */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual whose data was validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  "validation_log" TEXT /* Log of the validation process */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation (e.g., algorithm, statistical model) */,
  "validation_results" TEXT /* Results of the validation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id")
)
